> LIVE-MARKER-1776274720 bash: LIVE-MARKER-1776274720: command not fou nd > LIVE-MARKER-1776275922 bash: LIVE-MARKER-1776275922: command not fou nd > mkdir -p ~/Downloads/Documents/Reports/Expo rts && printf 'hello log
' > ~/Downloads/tes t.log && printf 'bin
' > ~/Downloads/unsuppo rted.bin && python3 - <<'EOF' > from pathlib import Path > p = Path.home()/"Downloads"/"huge.txt" > p.write_text("A" * (600 * 1024), encoding=" utf-8") > EOF > printf 'FIXTURES_READY
' FIXTURES_READY > mkdir -p ~/Downloads/Do
